Physical functioning and structural problems: ADL functional rehabilitatio potential - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
259 G9 G9_CHG_ADL (G9) Change in ADL Function CHAR 1 This field indicates if the resident's ADL self-performance status has changed as compred to the status fo 90 days ago (or since last assessment if less than 90 days). 0 = No Change, 1 = Improved, 2 = Deteriorated, "-" = Unknown.
